description: Single-agent skill lab - EVOLVE set (what the engine learns from). Same HR facts as the held-out test set but DIFFERENT phrasings, so the test measures generalization, not memorization. The flawed V0 ('answer only from the baked summary, else contact HR') defers on most of these even though lookup_company_policy can answer them; the engine should learn a tool-first rule.

questions.question: How many vacation days do I get a year?
